basic_atk.name: Frigid Cold Arrow

Provides a single ally with a Shield that can absorb DMG equal to 66.5% of March 7th's DEF plus 973.75 for 3 turn(s).
If the ally's current HP percentage is 30% or higher, greatly increases the chance of enemies attacking that ally.

basic_atk.description: Deals Ice DMG equal to 140% of Pela's ATK to one designated enemy target.

skill.name: Frostbite
skill.description: Removes 1 buff(s) and deals Ice DMG equal to 262.5% of Pela's ATK to one designated target enemy.

ultimate.name: Zone Suppression
ultimate.description:
Deals Ice DMG equal to 120% of Pela's ATK to all enemies, with a 100% base chance to inflict Exposed on all enemies.
When Exposed, enemies' DEF is reduced by 45% for 2 turn(s).

talent.name: Data Collecting
talent.description: If the enemy is debuffed after Pela's attack, Pela will restore 12.5 additional Energy. This effect can only be triggered 1 time per attack.

technique.name: Preemptive Strike
technique.description: Immediately attacks the enemy. Upon entering battle, Pela deals Ice DMG equal to 80% of her ATK to a random enemy, with a 100% base chance of lowering the DEF of all enemies by 20% for 2 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Victory Report
eidolons.description: When an enemy is defeated, Pela regenerates 5 Energy.

eidolons.name: Adamant Charge
eidolons.description: Using Skill to dispel buff(s) increases SPD by 10% for 2 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Suppressive Force
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Full Analysis
eidolons.description: When using Skill, there is a 100% base chance to reduce the target enemy's Ice RES by 12% for 2 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Absolute Jeopardy
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Feeble Pursuit
eidolons.description: After Pela attacks, if the enemy target is debuffed, deals Ice Additional DMG equal to 40% of Pela's ATK to the enemy.

basic_atk.name: I Want to Help
basic_atk.description: Deals Physical DMG equal to 140% of Clara's ATK to one designated enemy.

skill.name: Svarog Watches Over You
skill.description:
Deals Physical DMG equal to 150% of Clara's ATK to all enemies, and additionally deals Physical DMG equal to 150% of Clara's ATK to enemies marked by Svarog with a Mark of Counter.
All Marks of Counter will be removed after this Skill is used.

ultimate.name: Promise, Not Command
ultimate.description:
After Clara uses Ultimate, DMG dealt to her is reduced by an extra 30%, and she has greatly increased chances of being attacked by enemies for 2 turn(s).
In addition, Svarog's Counter is enhanced. When an ally is attacked, Svarog immediately launches a Counter, and its DMG multiplier against the enemy increases by 192%. Enemies adjacent to it take 50% of the DMG dealt to the primary target enemy. Enhanced Counter(s) can take effect 2 time(s).

talent.name: Because We're Family
talent.description: Under the protection of Svarog, DMG taken by Clara when hit by enemy attacks is reduced by 10%. Svarog will mark enemies who attack Clara with his Mark of Counter and retaliate with a Counter, dealing Physical DMG equal to 200% of Clara's ATK.

technique.name: A Small Price for Victory
technique.description: Immediately attacks the enemy. Upon entering battle, the chance Clara will be attacked by enemies increases for 2 turn(s).

eidolons.name: A Tall Figure
eidolons.description: Using Skill will not remove Marks of Counter on the enemy.

eidolons.name: A Tight Embrace
eidolons.description: After using the Ultimate, ATK increases by 30% for 2 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Cold Steel Armor
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Family's Warmth
eidolons.description: After Clara is hit, the DMG taken by Clara is reduced by 30%. This effect lasts until the start of her next turn.

eidolons.name: A Small Promise
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Long Company
eidolons.description: After other allies are attacked, Svarog also has a 50% fixed chance to trigger a Counter on the attacker and mark them with a "Mark of Counter." When using Ultimate, the number of Enhanced Counters increases by 1.

basic_atk.name: Dazzling Blades
basic_atk.description: Deals Wind DMG equal to 140% of Sampo's ATK to one designated enemy.

skill.name: Ricochet Love
skill.description: Deals Wind DMG equal to 70% of Sampo's ATK to one designated enemy, and further deals DMG for 4 extra time(s), with each time dealing Wind DMG equal to 70% of Sampo's ATK to a random enemy.

ultimate.name: Surprise Present
ultimate.description: Deals Wind DMG equal to 192% of Sampo's ATK to all enemies, with a 100% base chance to increase the targets' DoT taken by 35% for 2 turn(s).

talent.name: Windtorn Dagger
talent.description:
Sampo's attacks have a 65% base chance to inflict Wind Shear for 3 turn(s).
Enemies inflicted with Wind Shear will take Wind DoT equal to 65% of Sampo's ATK at the beginning of each turn. Wind Shear can stack up to 5 time(s).

technique.name: Shining Bright
technique.description:
After Sampo uses his Technique, enemies in a set area are afflicted with Blind for 10 second(s). Blinded enemies cannot detect ally targets.
When initiating combat against a Blinded enemy, there is a 100% fixed chance to delay all enemies' action by 25%.

eidolons.name: Rising Love
eidolons.description: When using Skill, deals DMG for 1 extra time(s) to a random enemy.

eidolons.name: Infectious Enthusiasm
eidolons.description: Defeating an enemy afflicted with Wind Shear has a 100% base chance to inflict all enemies with 1 stack(s) of Wind Shear, equivalent to that of Skill.

eidolons.name: Big Money!
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: The Deeper the Love, the Stronger the Hate
eidolons.description: When Skill hits an enemy with 5 or more stack(s) of Wind Shear, the enemy immediately takes 8% of current Wind Shear DMG.

eidolons.name: Huuuuge Money!
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Increased Spending
eidolons.description: Talent's Wind Shear DMG multiplier increases by 15%.

basic_atk.name: Hehe! Don't Get Burned!
basic_atk.description: Deals Fire DMG equal to 140% of Hook's ATK to one designated enemy.

skill.name: Hey! Remember Hook?
skill.description:
Deals Fire DMG equal to 300% of Hook's ATK to one designated enemy. In addition, there is a 100% base chance to inflict Burn for 2 turn(s).
When afflicted with Burn, enemies will take Fire DoT equal to 81.25% of Hook's ATK at the beginning of each turn.

ultimate.name: Boom! Here Comes the Fire!
ultimate.description:
Deals Fire DMG equal to 480% of Hook's ATK to one designated enemy.
After using Ultimate, the next Skill to be used is Enhanced, which deals DMG to one designated enemy and enemies adjacent to it.

talent.name: Ha! Oil to the Flames!
talent.description: When attacking a target afflicted with Burn, deals Fire Additional DMG equal to 125% of Hook's ATK and regenerates 5 extra Energy.

technique.name: Ack! Look at This Mess!
technique.description:
Immediately attacks the enemy. Upon entering battle, Hook deals Fire DMG equal to 50% of her ATK to a random enemy. In addition, there is a 100% base chance to inflict Burn on every enemy for 3 turn(s).
When afflicted with Burn, enemies will take Fire DoT equal to 50% of Hook's ATK at the beginning of each turn.

extraAbilities.name: Hey! Remember Hook?
extraAbilities.description:
Deals Fire DMG equal to 350% of Hook's ATK to one designated enemy, with a 100% base chance to Burn them for 2 turn(s). Additionally, deals Fire DMG equal to 100% of Hook's ATK to enemies adjacent to it.
When afflicted with Burn, enemies will take Fire DoT equal to 81.25% of Hook's ATK at the beginning of each turn.

eidolons.name: Early to Bed, Early to Rise
eidolons.description: Enhanced Skill deals 20% increased DMG.

eidolons.name: Happy Tummy, Happy Body
eidolons.description: Extends the duration of Burn caused by Skill by 1 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Don't Be Picky, Nothing's Icky
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: It's Okay to Not Know
eidolons.description: When Talent is triggered, there is a 100% base chance to Burn enemies adjacent to the designated enemy target, equivalent to that of Skill.

eidolons.name: Let the Moles' Deeds Be Known
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Always Ready to Punch and Kick
eidolons.description: Hook deals 20% more DMG to enemies afflicted with Burn.

basic_atk.name: Ice Crampon Technique
basic_atk.description: Deals Quantum DMG equal to 70% of this character's Max HP to one designated enemy.

skill.name: Salted Camping Cans
skill.description:
Applies "Survival Response" to a single target ally and increases their Max HP by 8.8% of Lynx's Max HP plus 256.25. If the target ally is a character on the Path of Destruction or Preservation, the chance of them being attacked by enemies will greatly increase. "Survival Response" lasts for 2 turn(s).
Restores the target's HP by 14.0% of Lynx's Max HP plus 410.

ultimate.name: Snowfield First Aid
ultimate.description: Dispels 1 debuff(s) from all allies and immediately restores their respective HP by an amount equal to 15.8% of Lynx's Max HP plus 461.25.

talent.name: Outdoor Survival Experience
talent.description: When using Lynx's Skill or Ultimate, applies continuous healing to the target ally for 2 turn(s), restoring the target ally's HP by an amount equal to 4.2% of Lynx's Max HP plus 123 at the start of each turn. If the target has "Survival Response," the continuous healing effect additionally restores HP by an amount equal to 5.3% of Lynx's Max HP plus 153.75.

technique.name: Chocolate Energy Bar
technique.description: After Lynx uses her Technique, at the start of the next battle, all allies are granted her Talent's continuous healing effect, lasting for 2 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Morning of Snow Hike
eidolons.description: When healing allies with HP percentage equal to or lower than 50%, Lynx's Outgoing Healing increases by 20%. This effect also works on continuous healing.

eidolons.name: Noon of Portable Furnace
eidolons.description: A target with "Survival Response" can resist debuff application for 1 time(s).

eidolons.name: Afternoon of Avalanche Beacon
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Dusk of Warm Campfire
eidolons.description: When "Survival Response" is gained, increases the target's ATK by an amount equal to 3.0% of Lynx's Max HP for 1 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Night of Aurora Tea
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Dawn of Explorers' Chart
eidolons.description: Additionally boosts the Max HP increasing effect of "Survival Response" by an amount equal to 6.0% of Lynx's Max HP and increases Effect RES by 30%.

basic_atk.name: Direct Punch
basic_atk.description: Deals Physical DMG equal to 140% of Luka's ATK to one designated enemy.

skill.name: Lacerating Fist
skill.description:
Deals Physical DMG equal to 150% of Luka's ATK to one designated enemy target. In addition, there is a 100% base chance to inflict Bleed on them, lasting for 3 turn(s).
While Bleeding, the enemy will take 24.0% of their Max HP as Physical DoT at the start of each turn. This DMG will not exceed more than 422.5% of Luka's ATK.

ultimate.name: Coup de Grâce
ultimate.description: Receives 2 stack(s) of "Fighting Will," with a 100% base chance to increase one designated enemy target's DMG received by 24.0% for 3 turn(s). Then, deals Physical DMG equal to 396% of Luka's ATK to the target.

talent.name: Flying Sparks
talent.description: After Luka uses his Basic ATK "Direct Punch" or Skill "Lacerating Fist," he receives 1 stack of Fighting Will, up to 4 stacks. When he has 2 or more stacks of Fighting Will, his Basic ATK "Direct Punch" is enhanced to "Sky-Shatter Fist." After his Enhanced Basic ATK's "Rising Uppercut" hits a Bleeding enemy target, the Bleed status will immediately deal DMG for 1 time equal to 93.5% of the original DMG to the target. At the start of battle, Luka will possess 1 stack of Fighting Will.

technique.name: Anticipator
technique.description: Immediately attacks the enemy. Upon entering battle, Luka deals Physical DMG equal to 50% of his ATK to a random single enemy with a 100% base chance to inflict his Skill's Bleed effect on the target. Then, Luka gains 1 additional stack of Fighting Will.

extraAbilities.name: Sky-Shatter Fist
extraAbilities.description:
Consumes 2 stacks of "Fighting Will." First, uses "Direct Punch" to deal 3 hits, with each hit dealing Physical DMG equal to 28% of Luka's ATK to one designated enemy target.
Then, uses "Rising Uppercut" to deal 1 hit, dealing Physical DMG equal to 112% of Luka's ATK to the designated enemy target.

eidolons.name: Fighting Endlessly
eidolons.description: When Luka takes action, if the target enemy is Bleeding, increases DMG dealt by Luka by 15% for 2 turn(s).

eidolons.name: The Enemy is Weak, I am Strong
eidolons.description: If the Skill hits an enemy target with Physical Weakness, gain 1 stack(s) of Fighting Will.

eidolons.name: Born for the Ring
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Never Turning Back
eidolons.description: For every stack of Fighting Will obtained, increases ATK by 5%, stacking up to 4 time(s).

eidolons.name: The Spirit of Wildfire
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: A Champion's Applause
eidolons.description: After the Enhanced Basic ATK's "Rising Uppercut" hits a Bleeding enemy target, the Bleed status will immediately deal DMG 1 time equal to 8% of the original DMG for every hit of Direct Punch already unleashed during the current Enhanced Basic ATK.

basic_atk.name: Deficit...
basic_atk.description: Deals Fire DMG equal to 140% of Topaz's ATK to one designated enemy.

skill.name: Difficulty Paying?
skill.description:
Inflicts one designated enemy target with a "Proof of Debt" state, increasing the Follow-Up ATK DMG it receives by 62.5%. "Proof of Debt" only takes effect on the most recent target it is applied to. If there are no enemies inflicted with "Proof of Debt" on the field when an ally's turn starts or when an ally takes action, Topaz will inflict a random enemy with "Proof of Debt."
Numby deals Fire DMG equal to 187.5% of Topaz's ATK to this target. Using this Skill to deal DMG is considered as launching a Follow-Up ATK.

ultimate.name: Turn a Profit!
ultimate.description: Numby enters the Windfall Bonanza! state and its DMG multiplier increases by 187.5% and CRIT DMG increases by 31.25%. Also, when enemies with Proof of Debt are hit by an ally's Basic ATK, Skill, or Ultimate, Numby's action is Advanced Forward by 50%. Numby exits the Windfall Bonanza! state after using 2 attacks.

talent.name: Trotter Market!?
talent.description:
Summons Numby at the start of battle. Numby has 80 SPD by default. When taking action, Numby launches Follow-Up ATKs on one enemy target afflicted with "Proof of Debt," dealing Fire DMG equal to 187.5% of Topaz's ATK.
When enemies afflicted with "Proof of Debt" receive an ally's Follow-Up ATKs, Numby's action is Advanced Forward by 50%. The action Advance Forward effect cannot be triggered during Numby's own turn.
When Topaz is downed, Numby disappears.

technique.name: Explicit Subsidy
technique.description:
Summons Numby when Topaz enters the overworld. Numby will automatically search for Basic Treasures and Trotters within a set radius.
Using her Technique will regenerate 60 Energy for Topaz after Numby's first attack in the next battle.
If Topaz is still in the team after using her Technique and defeating overworld enemies, a small bonus amount of credits will be added to the earned credits. A maximum of 10000 bonus credits can be received per calendar day.
After using her Technique and defeating enemies in Simulated Universe or Divergent Universe, additionally receive a small amount of Cosmic Fragments with a small chance to obtain 1 random Curio.

eidolons.name: Future Market
eidolons.description:
When enemies afflicted with "Proof of Debt" receive Follow-Up ATKs, they will enter the "Debtor" state. This can take effect only once within a single attack.
The "Debtor" state increases the CRIT DMG of Follow-Up ATKs inflicted on the enemy target by 25%, stacking up to 2 time(s). When "Proof of Debt" is removed, the "Debtor" state is also removed.

eidolons.name: Bona Fide Acquisition
eidolons.description: After Numby takes action and launches an attack, Topaz regenerates 5 Energy.

eidolons.name: Seize the Big and Free the Small
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Agile Operation
eidolons.description: After Numby's turn begins, Topaz's action advances by 20%.

eidolons.name: Inflationary Demand
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Incentive Mechanism
eidolons.description: Numby's attack count during the "Windfall Bonanza!" state increases by 1, and its Fire RES PEN increases by 10% when it attacks.

basic_atk.name: Flower Pick
basic_atk.description: Tosses 1 jade tile from the suit with the fewest tiles in hand to deal Quantum DMG equal to 140% of Qingque's ATK to one designated enemy.

skill.name: A Scoop of Moon
skill.description: Immediately draws 2 jade tile(s) and increases DMG by 35% until the end of the current turn. This effect can stack up to 4 time(s). The turn will not end after this Skill is used.

ultimate.name: A Quartet? Woo-hoo!
ultimate.description: Deals Quantum DMG equal to 240% of Qingque's ATK to all enemies, and obtains 4 jade tiles of the same suit.

talent.name: Celestial Jade
talent.description:
When an ally's turn starts, Qingque randomly draws 1 tile from 3 different suits and can hold up to 4 tiles at one time.
If Qingque starts her turn with 4 tiles of the same suit, she consumes all tiles to enter the "Hidden Hand" state.
While in this state, Qingque cannot use her Skill again. At the same time, Qingque's ATK increases by 90%, and her Basic ATK "Flower Pick" is enhanced, becoming "Cherry on Top!" The "Hidden Hand" state ends after using "Cherry on Top!".

technique.name: Game Solitaire
technique.description: After using Technique, Qingque draws 2 jade tile(s) when the battle starts.

extraAbilities.name: Cherry on Top!
extraAbilities.description:
Deals Quantum DMG equal to 336% of Qingque's ATK to one designated enemy, and deals Quantum DMG equal to 140% of Qingque's ATK to enemies adjacent to it.
"Cherry on Top!" cannot recover Skill Points.

eidolons.name: Rise Through the Tiles
eidolons.description: Ultimate deals 10% more DMG.

eidolons.name: Sleep on the Tiles
eidolons.description: Every time Draw Tile is triggered, Qingque immediately regenerates 1 Energy.

eidolons.name: Read Between the Tiles
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Right on the Tiles
eidolons.description:
After using Skill, there is a 24% fixed chance to gain "Self-Sufficer," lasting until the end of the current turn. 
While "Self-Sufficer" is active, using Basic ATK or Enhanced Basic ATK immediately launches 1 Follow-Up ATK on the same target, dealing Quantum DMG equal to 100% of Basic ATK DMG or Enhanced Basic ATK DMG.

eidolons.name: Gambit for the Tiles
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Prevail Beyond the Tiles
eidolons.description: Recovers 1 Skill Point after using Enhanced Basic ATK.

basic_atk.name: Dislodged
basic_atk.description: Tingyun deals Lightning DMG equal to 140% of her ATK to one designated enemy.

skill.name: Soothing Melody
skill.description:
Grants a single ally with Benediction to increase their ATK by 62.5%, up to 30% of Tingyun's current ATK.
When the ally with Benediction attacks, they will deal Lightning Additional DMG equal to 50% of that ally's ATK for 1 time.
Benediction lasts for 3 turn(s) and is only effective on the most recent receiver of Tingyun's Skill.

ultimate.name: Amidst the Rejoicing Clouds
ultimate.description: Regenerates 50 Energy for a single ally and increases the target's DMG by 65% for 2 turn(s).

talent.name: Violet Sparknado
talent.description: When an enemy is attacked by Tingyun, the ally with Benediction immediately deals Lightning Additional DMG equal to 75% of that ally's ATK to the same enemy.

technique.name: Gentle Breeze
technique.description: Tingyun immediately regenerates 50 Energy upon using her Technique.

eidolons.name: Windfall of Lucky Springs
eidolons.description: After using their Ultimate, the ally with Benediction gains a 20% increase in SPD for 1 turn.

eidolons.name: Gainfully Gives, Givingly Gains
eidolons.description: The ally with Benediction regenerates 5 Energy after defeating an enemy. This effect can only be triggered once per turn.

eidolons.name: Halcyon Bequest
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Jovial Versatility
eidolons.description: The DMG multiplier provided by Benediction increases by 20%.

eidolons.name: Sauntering Coquette
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Peace Brings Wealth to All
eidolons.description: Ultimate regenerates 10 more Energy for the target ally.

basic_atk.name: Thorns of the Abyss
basic_atk.description: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to 140% of Luocha's ATK to one designated enemy.

skill.name: Prayer of Abyss Flower
skill.description:
After using his Skill, Luocha immediately restores the target ally's HP equal to 70% of Luocha's ATK plus 1025. Meanwhile, Luocha gains 1 stack of Abyss Flower.
When any ally's HP percentage drops to 50% or lower, an effect equivalent to Luocha's Skill will immediately be triggered and applied to this ally for one time (without consuming Skill Points). This effect can be triggered again after 2 turn(s).

ultimate.name: Death Wish
ultimate.description: Removes 1 buff(s) from all enemies and deals all enemies Imaginary DMG equal to 240% of Luocha's ATK. At the same time, Luocha gains 1 stack of Abyss Flower.

talent.name: Cycle of Life
talent.description:
When Abyss Flower reaches 2 stacks, Luocha consumes all stacks of Abyss Flower to deploy a Zone against the enemy.
When any enemy in the Zone is attacked by an ally, the attacking ally's HP is immediately restored by an amount equal to 21.0% of Luocha's ATK plus 307.5.
The Zone's effect lasts for 2 turns. When Luocha is knocked down, the Zone will be dispelled.

technique.name: Mercy of a Fool
technique.description: After the Technique is used, the Talent will be immediately triggered at the start of the next battle.

eidolons.name: Ablution of the Quick
eidolons.description: While the Zone is active, ATK of all allies increases by 20%.

eidolons.name: Bestowal From the Pure
eidolons.description: When his Skill is triggered, if the target ally's HP percentage is lower than 50%, Luocha's Outgoing Healing increases by 30%. If the target ally's HP percentage is at 50% or higher, the ally receives a Shield that can absorb DMG equal to 18% of Luocha's ATK plus 240, lasting for 2 turns.

eidolons.name: Surveyal by the Fool
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Heavy Lies the Crown
eidolons.description: When Luocha's Zone is active, enemies become Weakened and deal 12% less DMG.

eidolons.name: Cicatrix 'Neath the Pain
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Reunion With the Dust
eidolons.description: When Ultimate is used, there is a 100% fixed chance to reduce all enemies' All-Type RES by 20% for 2 turn(s).

basic_atk.name: Glistening Light
basic_atk.description: Jing Yuan deals Lightning DMG equal to 140% of his ATK to one designated enemy.

skill.name: Rifting Zenith
skill.description: Deals Lightning DMG equal to 125% of Jing Yuan's ATK to all enemies and increases Lightning-Lord's Hits Per Action by 2 for the next turn.

ultimate.name: Lightbringer
ultimate.description: Deals Lightning DMG equal to 240% of Jing Yuan's ATK to all enemies and increases Lightning-Lord's Hits Per Action by 3 for the next turn.

talent.name: Prana Extirpated
talent.description:
Summons "Lightning-Lord" at the start of the battle. "Lightning-Lord" has 60 base SPD and 3 base Hits Per Action. When the Lightning-Lord takes action, its hits are considered as Follow-Up ATKs, with each hit dealing Lightning DMG equal to 82.5% of Jing Yuan's ATK to a random single enemy, and enemies adjacent to it also receive Lightning DMG equal to 25% of the DMG dealt to the primary target enemy.
The Lightning-Lord's Hits Per Action can reach a max of 10. Every time "Lightning-Lord's" Hits Per Action increases by 1, its SPD increases by 10. After the "Lightning-Lord's" action ends, its SPD and Hits Per Action return to their base values.
When Jing Yuan is knocked down, the "Lightning-Lord" will disappear.
When Jing Yuan is affected by Crowd Control debuff, the "Lightning-Lord" is unable to take action.

technique.name: Spiritus Invocation
technique.description: After the Technique is used, the Lightning-Lord's Hits Per Action in the first turn increases by 3 at the start of the next battle.

eidolons.name: Slash, Seas Split
eidolons.description: When Lightning-Lord attacks, the DMG multiplier on enemies adjacent to the target enemy increases by an extra amount equal to 25% of the DMG multiplier against the primary target enemy.

eidolons.name: Swing, Skies Squashed
eidolons.description: After Lightning-Lord takes action, DMG dealt by Jing Yuan's Basic ATK, Skill, and Ultimate increases by 20%, lasting for 2 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Strike, Suns Subdued
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Spin, Stars Sieged
eidolons.description: For each hit performed by the Lightning-Lord when it takes action, Jing Yuan regenerates 2 Energy.

eidolons.name: Stride, Spoils Seized
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Sweep, Souls Slain
eidolons.description:
Each hit performed by the Lightning-Lord when it takes action will make the target enemy Vulnerable.
While Vulnerable, enemies receive 12% more DMG until the end of the Lightning-Lord's current turn, stacking up to 3 time(s).

basic_atk.name: Cloudfencer Art: Starshine
basic_atk.description: Deals Physical DMG equal to 140% of Sushang's ATK to one designated enemy.

skill.name: Cloudfencer Art: Mountainfall
skill.description:
Deals Physical DMG equal to 262.5% of Sushang's ATK to one designated enemy. In addition, there is a 33% chance to trigger "Sword Stance" on the final hit, dealing Physical Additional DMG equal to 125% of Sushang's ATK to the enemy.
If the enemy is inflicted with Weakness Break, "Sword Stance" is guaranteed to trigger.

ultimate.name: Shape of Taixu: Dawn Herald
ultimate.description:
Deals Physical DMG equal to 384% of Sushang's ATK to one designated enemy target, and she immediately takes action. In addition, Sushang's ATK increases by 36% and using her Skill has 2 extra chances to trigger "Sword Stance" for 2 turn(s).
"Sword Stance" triggered from the extra chances deals 50% of the original DMG.

talent.name: Dancing Blade
talent.description: When an enemy has their Weakness Broken on the field, Sushang's SPD increases by 22.50% for 2 turn(s).

technique.name: Cloudfencer Art: Warcry
technique.description: Immediately attacks the enemy. Upon entering battle, Sushang deals Physical DMG equal to 80% of her ATK to all enemies.

eidolons.name: Cut With Ease
eidolons.description: After using Skill against a Weakness Broken enemy, regenerates 1 Skill Point.

eidolons.name: Refine in Toil
eidolons.description: After Sword Stance is triggered, the DMG taken by Sushang is reduced by 20% for 1 turn.

eidolons.name: Rise From Fame
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Cleave With Heart
eidolons.description: Sushang's Break Effect increases by 40%.

eidolons.name: Prevail via Taixu
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Dwell Like Water
eidolons.description: Talent's SPD Boost is stackable and can stack up to 2 times. Additionally, after entering battle, Sushang immediately gains 1 stack of her Talent's SPD Boost.

basic_atk.name: Arrowslinger
basic_atk.description: Deals 140% of Yukong's ATK as Imaginary DMG to a target enemy.

skill.name: Emboldening Salvo
skill.description:
Obtains 2 stack(s) of "Roaring Bowstrings" (to a maximum of 2 stacks). When "Roaring Bowstrings" is active, the ATK of all allies increases by 100%, and every time an ally's turn (including Yukong's) ends, Yukong loses 1 stack of "Roaring Bowstrings."
When it's the turn where Yukong gains "Roaring Bowstrings" by using Skill, "Roaring Bowstrings" will not be removed.

ultimate.name: Diving Kestrel
ultimate.description: If "Roaring Bowstrings" is active on Yukong when her Ultimate is used, additionally increases all allies' CRIT Rate by 31.5% and CRIT DMG by 78%. At the same time, deals Imaginary DMG equal to 456% of Yukong's ATK to one designated enemy.

talent.name: Seven Layers, One Arrow
talent.description: Basic ATK additionally deals Imaginary DMG equal to 100% of Yukong's ATK, and increases the Toughness Reduction of this attack by 100%. This effect can be triggered again after 1 turn(s).

technique.name: Windchaser
technique.description: After using her Technique, Yukong enters Sprint mode for 20 seconds. In Sprint mode, her movement speed increases by 35%, and Yukong gains 2 stack(s) of "Roaring Bowstrings" when she enters combat by attacking enemies.

eidolons.name: Aerial Marshal
eidolons.description: At the start of battle, increases the SPD of all allies by 10% for 2 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Skyward Command
eidolons.description: When any ally's current energy is equal to its energy limit, Yukong regenerates an additional 5 energy. This effect can only be triggered once for each ally. The trigger count is reset after Yukong uses her Ultimate.

eidolons.name: Torrential Fusillade
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Zephyrean Echoes
eidolons.description: When "Roaring Bowstrings" is active, Yukong deals 30% more DMG to enemies.

eidolons.name: August Deadshot
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Bowstring Thunderclap
eidolons.description: When Yukong uses her Ultimate, she immediately gains 1 stack(s) of "Roaring Bowstrings."

basic_atk.name: Novaburst
basic_atk.description: Deals Quantum DMG equal to 70% of Fu Xuan's Max HP to one designated enemy.

skill.name: Known by Stars, Shown by Hearts
skill.description:
Activates Matrix of Prescience, via which Fu Xuan's teammates will Distribute 65% of the DMG they receive (before this DMG is mitigated by any Shields) to Fu Xuan for 3 turn(s).
While affected by Matrix of Prescience, all ally targets gain the Knowledge effect, which increases their respective Max HP by 7.5% of Fu Xuan's Max HP, and increases CRIT Rate by 15.0%.
When Fu Xuan is knocked down, the Matrix of Prescience will be dispelled.

ultimate.name: Woes of Many Morphed to One
ultimate.description: Deals Quantum DMG equal to 120% of Fu Xuan's Max HP to all enemies and obtains 1 trigger count for the HP Restore effect granted by Fu Xuan's Talent.

talent.name: Bleak Breeds Bliss
talent.description:
While Fu Xuan is still active in combat, Misfortune Avoidance is applied to the entire team. With Misfortune Avoidance, allies take 22.0% less DMG.
When Fu Xuan's current HP percentage falls to 50% of her Max HP or less, HP Restore will be triggered for Fu Xuan, restoring her HP by 95% of the amount of HP she is currently missing. This effect cannot be triggered if she receives a killing blow. This effect has 1 trigger count by default and can hold up to a maximum of 2 trigger counts.

technique.name: Of Fortune Comes Fate
technique.description: After the Technique is used, all team members receive a Barrier, lasting for 20 seconds. This Barrier can block all enemy attacks, and the team will not enter combat when attacked. Entering battle while the Barrier is active will have Fu Xuan automatically activate Matrix of Prescience at the start of the battle, lasting for 2 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Dominus Pacis
eidolons.description: The Knowledge effect increases CRIT DMG by 30%.

eidolons.name: Optimus Felix
eidolons.description: If any ally target is struck by a killing blow while "Matrix of Prescience" is active, then all ally targets who were struck by a killing blow during this action will not be knocked down, and 70% of their Max HP is immediately restored. This effect can trigger 1 time per battle.

eidolons.name: Apex Nexus
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Fortuna Stellaris
eidolons.description: When other allies under Matrix of Prescience are attacked, Fu Xuan regenerates 5 Energy.

eidolons.name: Arbiter Primus
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Omnia Vita
eidolons.description:
Once Matrix of Prescience is activated, it will keep a tally of the total HP lost by all team members in the current battle. The DMG dealt by Fu Xuan's Ultimate will increase by 200% of this tally of HP loss.
This tally is also capped at 120% of Fu Xuan's Max HP and the tally value will reset and re-accumulate after Fu Xuan's Ultimate is used.

basic_atk.name: Frost Thorn
basic_atk.description: Deals Ice DMG equal to 140% of Yanqing's ATK to one designated enemy.

skill.name: Darting Ironthorn
skill.description: Deals Ice DMG equal to 275% of Yanqing's ATK to one designated enemy and activates "Soulsteel Sync" for 1 turn.

ultimate.name: Amidst the Raining Bliss
ultimate.description: Increases Yanqing's CRIT Rate by 60%. When "Soulsteel Sync" is active, increases Yanqing's CRIT DMG by an extra 60%. This buff lasts for one turn. Afterwards, deals Ice DMG equal to 420% of Yanqing's ATK to one designated enemy.

talent.name: One With the Sword
talent.description:
When "Soulsteel Sync" is active, Yanqing is less likely to be attacked by enemies. Yanqing's CRIT Rate increases by 22.5% and his CRIT DMG increases by 37.5%. After Yanqing attacks an enemy, there is a 65% fixed chance to launch Follow-Up ATK, dealing Ice DMG equal to 62.5% of Yanqing's ATK to the enemy, which has a 65% base chance to Freeze the enemy for 1 turn.
The Frozen target cannot take action and receives Ice Additional DMG equal to 62.5% of Yanqing's ATK at the beginning of each turn.
When Yanqing receives DMG, the "Soulsteel Sync" effect will disappear.

technique.name: The One True Sword
technique.description: After using his Technique, at the start of the next battle, Yanqing deals 30% more DMG for 2 turn(s) to enemies whose current HP percentage is 50% or higher.

eidolons.name: Svelte Saber
eidolons.description: When Yanqing attacks a Frozen enemy, he deals Ice Additional DMG equal to 60% of his ATK.

eidolons.name: Supine Serenade
eidolons.description: When Soulsteel Sync is active, Energy Regeneration Rate increases by an extra 10%.

eidolons.name: Sword Savant
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Searing Sting
eidolons.description: When the current HP percentage is 80% or higher, this unit's Ice RES PEN increases by 12%.

eidolons.name: Surging Strife
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Swift Swoop
eidolons.description: If the buffs from "Soulsteel Sync" or the Ultimate are in effect when an enemy is defeated, the duration of these buffs is extended by 1 turn.

basic_atk.name: Standing Ovation
basic_atk.description: Deals Fire DMG equal to 140% of Guinaifen's ATK to one designated enemy.

skill.name: Blazing Welcome
skill.description: Deals Fire DMG equal to 150% of Guinaifen's ATK to one designated enemy and Fire DMG equal to 50% of Guinaifen's ATK to any adjacent enemies, with a 100% base chance to Burn the target and adjacent targets. When Burned, enemies will take a Fire DoT equal to 272.77% of Guinaifen's ATK at the beginning of each turn, lasting for 2 turn(s).

ultimate.name: Watch This Showstopper
ultimate.description: Deals Fire DMG equal to 144.0% of Guinaifen's ATK to all enemies. If the target enemy is currently inflicted with Burn, then their Burn status immediately produces DMG equal to 102% of their original DMG.

talent.name: PatrAeon Benefits
talent.description: When Guinaifen is on the field, there is a 100% base chance to apply Firekiss to an enemy after their Burn status causes DMG. While inflicted with Firekiss, the enemy receives 8.5% increased DMG, which lasts for 3 turn(s) and can stack up to 3 time(s).

technique.name: Skill Showcase
technique.description: Immediately attacks the enemy. After entering battle, deals DMG for 4 time(s), dealing Fire DMG equal to 50% of Guinaifen's ATK to a random single enemy target each time, with a 100% base chance of inflicting Firekiss on them.

eidolons.name: Slurping Noodles During Handstand
eidolons.description: When Skill is used, there is a 100% base chance to reduce the attacked target enemy's Effect RES by 10% for 2 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Brushing Teeth While Whistling
eidolons.description: When an enemy target is being Burned, the DMG multiplier of the Burn status applied by her Basic ATK or Skill increases by 40%.

eidolons.name: Smashing Boulder on Chest
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Blocking Pike with Neck
eidolons.description: Every time the Burn status inflicted by Guinaifen causes DMG, Guinaifen regenerates 2 Energy.

eidolons.name: Swallowing Sword to Stomach
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Catching Bullet with Hands
eidolons.description: Increases the stackable Firekiss count by 1.

basic_atk.name: Diagnostic Kick
basic_atk.description: Deals Lightning DMG equal to 140% of Bailu's ATK to one designated enemy.

skill.name: Singing Among Clouds
skill.description: Heals a single ally for 13.7% of Bailu's Max HP plus 399.75. Bailu then heals random allies 2 time(s). After each healing, HP restored from the next healing is reduced by 15%.

ultimate.name: Felicitous Thunderleap
ultimate.description:
Heals all allies for 15.8% of Bailu's Max HP plus 461.25.
Bailu applies Invigoration to allies that are not already Invigorated. For those already Invigorated, Bailu extends the duration of their Invigoration by 1 turn.
The effect of Invigoration can last for 2 turn(s). This effect cannot stack.

talent.name: Gourdful of Elixir
talent.description:
After an ally target with Invigoration is hit, restores the ally's HP for 6.3% of Bailu's Max HP plus 184.5. This effect can trigger 2 time(s).
When Bailu's teammate receives a killing blow, they will not be knocked down. Bailu immediately heals the ally for 21.0% of Bailu's Max HP plus 615 HP. This effect can be triggered 1 time per battle.

technique.name: Saunter in the Rain
technique.description: After Technique is used, at the start of the next battle, all allies are granted Invigoration for 2 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Ambrosial Aqua
eidolons.description: If the target ally's current HP is equal to their Max HP when Invigoration ends, regenerates 8 extra Energy for this target.

eidolons.name: Sylphic Slumber
eidolons.description: After using her Ultimate, Bailu's Outgoing Healing increases by an additional 15% for 2 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Omniscient Opulence
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Evil Excision
eidolons.description: Every healing provided by the Skill makes the recipient deal 10% more DMG for 2 turn(s). This effect can stack up to 3 time(s).

eidolons.name: Waning Worries
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Drooling Drop of Draconic Divinity
eidolons.description: Bailu can heal allies who received a killing blow 1 more time(s) in a single battle.

basic_atk.name: Beneficent Lotus
basic_atk.description: Uses a 2-hit attack and deals Imaginary DMG equal to 140% of Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's ATK to one designated enemy target.

skill.name: Dracore Libre
skill.description:
Enhances Basic ATK. Enhancements may be applied up to 3 times consecutively. Using this ability does not consume Skill Points and is not considered as using a Skill.
Enhanced once, Beneficent Lotus becomes Transcendence.
Enhanced twice, Beneficent Lotus becomes Divine Spear.
Enhanced thrice, Beneficent Lotus becomes Fulgurant Leap.
When using Divine Spear or Fulgurant Leap, starting from the fourth hit, 1 stack of Outroar is gained before every hit. Each stack of Outroar increases Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's CRIT DMG by 15.0%, for a max of 4 stacks. These stacks last until the end of his turn.

ultimate.name: Azure's Aqua Ablutes All
ultimate.description:
Uses a 3-hit attack and deals Imaginary DMG equal to 360% of Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's ATK to one designated enemy target. At the same time, deals Imaginary DMG equal to 168% of Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's ATK to adjacent targets. Then, obtains 2 "Squama Sacrosancta."
It's possible to hold up to 3 "Squama Sacrosancta," which can be used to offset Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's consumption of skill points. Consuming "Squama Sacrosancta" is considered equivalent to consuming skill points.

talent.name: Righteous Heart
talent.description: After each hit dealt during an attack, Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae gains 1 stack of Righteous Heart, increasing his DMG by 12.5%. This effect can stack up to 6 time(s), lasting until the end of his turn.

technique.name: Heaven-Quelling Prismadrakon
technique.description: After using his Technique, Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae enters the Leaping Dragon state for 20 seconds. While in the Leaping Dragon state, using his attack enables him to move forward rapidly for a set distance, attacking all enemies he touches and blocking all incoming attacks. After entering combat via attacking enemies in the Leaping Dragon state, Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae deals Imaginary DMG equal to 120% of his ATK to all enemies, and gains 1 Squama Sacrosancta.

extraAbilities.name: Transcendence
extraAbilities.description: Uses a 3-hit attack and deals Imaginary DMG equal to 364% of Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's ATK to one designated enemy target.

extraAbilities.name: Divine Spear
extraAbilities.description: Uses a 5-hit attack and deals Imaginary DMG equal to 532% of Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's ATK to one designated enemy target. From the fourth hit onward, simultaneously deals Imaginary DMG equal to 84% of Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's ATK to adjacent targets.

extraAbilities.name: Fulgurant Leap
extraAbilities.description: Uses a 7-hit attack and deals Imaginary DMG equal to 700% of Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's ATK to one designated enemy target. From the fourth hit onward, simultaneously deal Imaginary DMG equal to 252% of Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's ATK to adjacent targets.

extraAbilities.name: Cancel
extraAbilities.description: Cancel Enhancement

eidolons.name: Tethered to Sky
eidolons.description: Increases the stackable Righteous Heart count by 4, and gains 1 extra stack of Righteous Heart for each hit during an attack.

eidolons.name: Imperium On Cloud Nine
eidolons.description: After using his Ultimate, Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's action advances by 100% and gains 1 extra "Squama Sacrosancta."

eidolons.name: Clothed in Clouds
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Zephyr's Bliss
eidolons.description: The buff effect granted by "Outroar" lasts until the end of this unit's next turn.

eidolons.name: Fall is the Pride
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Reign, Returned
eidolons.description: After another ally character uses their Ultimate, the Imaginary RES PEN of Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's next "Fulgurant Leap" attack increases by 20%. This effect can stack up to 3 time(s).

basic_atk.name: Mara-Sunder Awl
basic_atk.description: Deals 140% of Xueyi's ATK as Quantum DMG to one designated enemy target.

skill.name: Iniquity Obliteration
skill.description: Deals Quantum DMG equal to 175% of Xueyi's ATK to one designated enemy, and Quantum DMG equal to 87.5% of Xueyi's ATK to any adjacent enemies.

ultimate.name: Divine Castigation
ultimate.description:
Deals Quantum DMG equal to 300% of Xueyi's ATK to one designated enemy target. This attack ignores Weakness Types and reduces the enemy's Toughness. When the enemy's Weakness is Broken, the Quantum Weakness Break effect is triggered.
In this attack, the more Toughness is reduced, the higher the DMG will be dealt, up to a max of 72.0% increase.

talent.name: Karmic Perpetuation
talent.description:
When Xueyi reduces enemy Toughness with attacks, "Karma" will be stacked. The more Toughness is reduced, the more stacks of "Karma" are added, up to 8 stacks.
When Xueyi's teammates reduce enemy Toughness with attacks, Xueyi gains 1 stack(s) of "Karma."
When "Karma" reaches the max number of stacks, consumes all current "Karma" stacks and immediately launches Follow-Up ATK against an enemy target, dealing DMG for 3 times, with each time dealing Quantum DMG equal to 112.5% of Xueyi's ATK to a single random enemy. This Follow-Up ATK will not add "Karma" stacks.

technique.name: Summary Execution
technique.description: Immediately attacks the enemy. After entering combat, deals 80% of Xueyi's ATK as Quantum DMG to all enemies.

eidolons.name: Dvesha, Inhibited
eidolons.description: Increases the DMG dealt by the Talent's Follow-Up ATK by 40%.

eidolons.name: Klesha, Breached
eidolons.description: Talent's Follow-Up ATK Reduces enemy Toughness regardless of Weakness types. At the same time, restores Xueyi's HP by an amount equal to 5% of her Max HP. When breaking Weakness, triggers the Quantum Break Effect.

eidolons.name: Duḥkha, Ceased
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Karma, Severed
eidolons.description: When using Ultimate, increases Break Effect by 40% for 2 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Deva, Enthralled
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Saṃsāra, Mastered
eidolons.description: The max stack limit for Karma decreases to 6.

basic_atk.name: Oracle Brush
basic_atk.description: Deals Physical DMG equal to 140% of Hanya's ATK to one designated enemy.

skill.name: Samsara, Locked
skill.description:
Deals Physical DMG equal to 300% of Hanya's ATK to one designated enemy target, then applies "Burden" to them.
For every 2 Basic ATKs, Skills, or Ultimates allies use on an enemy with "Burden," allies will immediately recover 1 Skill Point. "Burden" is only active on the latest target it is applied to, and will be dispelled automatically after the Skill Point recovery effect has been triggered 2 times.

ultimate.name: Ten-Lords' Decree, All Shall Obey
ultimate.description: Increases the SPD of a target ally by 22.5% of Hanya's SPD and increases the same target ally's ATK by 72%, lasting for 2 turn(s).

talent.name: Sanction
talent.description: When an ally uses a Basic ATK, Skill, or Ultimate on an enemy inflicted with Burden, the DMG dealt increases by 37.5%, lasting for 2 turn(s).

technique.name: Netherworld Judgment
technique.description: Immediately attacks the enemy. After entering battle, applies Burden equivalent to that applied by the Skill to a random enemy.

eidolons.name: One Heart
eidolons.description: When an ally target with Hanya's Ultimate effect defeats an enemy, Hanya's action advances by 15%. This effect can only be triggered 1 time(s) per turn.

eidolons.name: Two Views
eidolons.description: After using the Skill, this character's SPD increases by 20% for 1 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Three Temptations
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Four Truths
eidolons.description: The Ultimate's duration is additionally extended for 1 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Five Skandhas
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Six Reverences
eidolons.description: Increase the DMG Boost effect of the Talent by an additional 10%.

basic_atk.name: Heart Afire
basic_atk.description: Deals Fire DMG equal to 140% of Jiaoqiu's ATK to one designated enemy target.

skill.name: Scorch Onslaught
skill.description: Deals Fire DMG equal to 187.5% of Jiaoqiu's ATK to one designated enemy target and Fire DMG equal to 112.5% of Jiaoqiu's ATK to adjacent targets, with a 100% base chance to inflict 1 stack of "Ashen Roast" on the primary target.

ultimate.name: Pyrograph Arcanum
ultimate.description:
Sets the number of "Ashen Roast" stacks on enemy targets to the highest number of "Ashen Roast" stacks present on the battlefield. Then, activates a Zone and deals Fire DMG equal to 120% of Jiaoqiu's ATK to all enemies.
While inside the Zone, enemy targets receive 18.0% increased Ultimate DMG, with a 65% base chance of being inflicted with 1 stack of Ashen Roast when taking action. While the Zone exists, this effect can trigger up to 6 time(s). And for each enemy target, it can only trigger once per turn. This trigger count resets every time Jiaoqiu uses Ultimate.
The Zone lasts for 3 turn(s), and its duration decreases by 1 at the start of this unit's every turn. If Jiaoqiu gets knocked down, the Zone will also be dispelled.

talent.name: Quartet Finesse, Octave Finery
talent.description:
When Jiaoqiu hits an enemy with Basic ATK, Skill or Ultimate, there is a 100% base chance to inflict 1 stack of Ashen Roast on them. At 1 stack, increases DMG received by the enemy by 18.8%. Then, each subsequent stack increases this by 6.3%.
Ashen Roast is capped at 5 stack(s) and lasts for 2 turn(s).
When an enemy target is afflicted with Ashen Roast, they are also considered as being Burned at the same time, taking Fire DoT equal to 225% of Jiaoqiu's ATK at the start of each turn.

technique.name: Fiery Queller
technique.description: After using Technique, creates a Special Dimension that lasts for 15 second(s). After entering combat with enemies in this Special Dimension, deals Fire DMG equal to 100% of Jiaoqiu's ATK to all enemies, with a 100% base chance of applying 1 "Ashen Roast" stack. Only 1 dimension created by allies can exist at the same time.

eidolons.name: Pentapathic Transference
eidolons.description: Allies deal 40% increased DMG to enemy targets afflicted with Ashen Roast. Whenever inflicting Ashen Roast on an enemy target via triggering the Talent's effect, additionally increases the number of "Ashen Roast" stacks applied this time by 1.

eidolons.name: From Savor Comes Suffer
eidolons.description: When an enemy target is afflicted with Ashen Roast, increases the multiplier for the Fire DoT dealt by Ashen Roast to this target by 300%.

eidolons.name: Flavored Euphony Reigns Supreme
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Leisure In, Luster Out
eidolons.description: When the Zone exists, reduces enemy target's ATK by 15%.

eidolons.name: Duel in Dawn, Dash in Dusk
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Nonamorphic Pyrobind
eidolons.description: When an enemy target gets defeated, their accumulated "Ashen Roast" stacks will transfer to the enemy with the lowest number of "Ashen Roast" stacks on the battlefield. The maximum stack limit of Ashen Roast increases to 9, and each "Ashen Roast" stack reduces the target's All-Type RES by 3%.

basic_atk.name: Boltsunder
basic_atk.description: Deals Wind DMG equal to 140% of Feixiao's ATK to one designated enemy target.

skill.name: Waraxe
skill.description: Deals Wind DMG equal to 250% of Feixiao's ATK to one designated enemy target. Then, immediately launches 1 extra instance of Talent's Follow-Up ATK against the target.

ultimate.name: Terrasplit
ultimate.description:
Deals Wind DMG to one designated enemy target, up to 849% of Feixiao's ATK. During this time, can ignore Weakness Type to reduce the target's Toughness. When the target is not Weakness Broken, Feixiao's Weakness Break Efficiency increases by 100%.
During the attack, Feixiao first launches "Boltsunder Blitz" or "Waraxe Skyward" on the target, for a total of 6 time(s). At the end, deals Wind DMG equal to 192% of Feixiao's ATK to the target.

talent.name: Thunderhunt
talent.description:
Can activate Ultimate when "Flying Aureus" reaches 6 points, accumulating up to 12 points. Feixiao gains 1 point of "Flying Aureus" for every 2 attacks by ally targets. Feixiao's Ultimate attacks do not count towards this number.
After Feixiao's teammates attack an Enemy target, Feixiao immediately launches Follow-Up ATK against the primary target, dealing Wind DMG equal to 137.5% of Feixiao's ATK. If there is no primary target available to attack, Feixiao attacks a single random enemy instead. This effect can only trigger once per turn and the trigger count resets at the start of Feixiao's turn. When using this attack, increases DMG dealt by this unit by 75%, lasting for 2 turn(s).

technique.name: Stormborn
technique.description:
After using Technique, enters the "Onrush" state, lasting for 20 seconds. While in "Onrush," pulls in enemies within a certain range, and increases this unit's movement speed by 50%. After entering battle, gains 1 point(s) of "Flying Aureus."
While in "Onrush," actively attacking will start battle with all pulled enemies. After entering battle, deals Wind DMG equal to 200% of Feixiao's ATK to all enemies at the start of each wave. This DMG is guaranteed to CRIT. If more than 1 enemy is pulled in, increases the multiplier of this DMG by 100% for each additional enemy pulled in, up to a maximum of 1000%.

extraAbilities.name: Boltsunder Blitz
extraAbilities.description: Deals Wind DMG equal to 72% of Feixiao's ATK to the chosen target. If the target is Weakness Broken, the DMG multiplier increases by 37.5%.

extraAbilities.name: Waraxe Skyward
extraAbilities.description: Deals Wind DMG equal to 72% of Feixiao's ATK to the chosen target. If the target is not Weakness Broken, the DMG multiplier increases by 37.5%.

extraAbilities.name: Terrasplit
extraAbilities.description:
During the Ultimate, can ignore Weakness Type to reduce enemy Toughness. When the target is not Weakness Broken, Feixiao's Weakness Break Efficiency increases.
Launches "Boltsunder Blitz" or "Waraxe Skyward" on one enemy 6 time(s). Deals Wind DMG at the end.

eidolons.name: Skyward I Quell
eidolons.description: After launching "Boltsunder Blitz" or "Waraxe Skyward," additionally increases the Ultimate DMG dealt by Feixiao by an amount equal to 10% of the original DMG, stacking up to 5 time(s) and lasting until the end of the Ultimate action.

eidolons.name: Moonward I Wish
eidolons.description: In the Talent's effect, for every 1 instance of Follow-Up ATK launched by ally targets, Feixiao gains 1 point of "Flying Aureus." This effect can trigger up to 6 time(s) per turn.

eidolons.name: Starward I Bode
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Stormward I Hear
eidolons.description: The Toughness Reduction from the Talent's Follow-Up ATK increases by 100% and, when launched, increases this unit's SPD by 8%, lasting for 2 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Heavenward I Leap
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Homeward I Near
eidolons.description: Increases the All-Type RES PEN of Ultimate DMG dealt by Feixiao by 20%. Talent's Follow-Up ATK DMG is considered as Ultimate DMG at the same time, and its DMG multiplier increases by 140%.

basic_atk.name: Galespin Summersault
basic_atk.description: Deals Physical DMG equal to 140% of Yunli's ATK to one designated enemy target.

skill.name: Bladeborne Quake
skill.description: Restores HP equal to 35.0% of Yunli's ATK plus 256.25. Deals Physical DMG equal to 150% of Yunli's ATK to one designated enemy target and Physical DMG equal to 75% of Yunli's ATK to adjacent targets.

ultimate.name: Earthbind, Etherbreak
ultimate.description:
Consumes 120 Energy. Yunli gains Parry and Taunts all enemies, lasting until the end of the next ally's or enemy's turn. Increases the CRIT DMG dealt by Yunli's next Counter by 120%. When triggering the Counter effect from Talent, launches the Counter "Intuit: Cull" instead and removes the Parry effect. If no Counter is triggered while Parry is active, Yunli will immediately launch the Counter "Intuit: Slash" on a random enemy target.
"Intuit: Slash": Deals Physical DMG equal to 264% of Yunli's ATK to the target, and deals Physical DMG equal to 132% of Yunli's ATK to adjacent targets.
"Intuit: Cull": Deals Physical DMG equal to 264% of Yunli's ATK to the target, and deals Physical DMG equal to 132% of Yunli's ATK to adjacent targets. Then, additionally deals 6 instances of DMG, each dealing Physical DMG equal to 86.4% of Yunli's ATK to a random single enemy.
When Yunli deals DMG via this ability, it's considered as dealing Ultimate DMG.

talent.name: Flashforge
talent.description:
When Yunli gets attacked by an enemy target, additionally regenerates 15 Energy and immediately launches a Counter on the attacker, dealing Physical DMG equal to 150% of Yunli's ATK to the attacker and Physical DMG equal to 75% of Yunli's ATK to adjacent targets.
If there is no immediate target to Counter, then Counters a random enemy target instead.

technique.name: Posterior Precedence
technique.description: This unit gains the Ward effect, lasting for 20 seconds. During this time, upon entering combat by either attacking enemies or receiving an attack, immediately casts "Intuit: Cull" on a random enemy, and increases the DMG dealt by this attack by 80%.

eidolons.name: Weathered Blade Does Not Sully
eidolons.description: Increases DMG dealt by "Intuit: Slash" and "Intuit: Cull" by 20%. Increases the number of additional DMG instances for "Intuit: Cull" by 3.

eidolons.name: First Luster Breaks Dawn
eidolons.description: When dealing DMG via Counter, ignores 20% of the target's DEF.

eidolons.name: Mastlength Twirls Mountweight
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Artisan's Ironsong
eidolons.description: After launching "Intuit: Slash" or "Intuit: Cull," increases this unit's Effect RES by 50%, lasting for 1 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Blade of Old Outlasts All
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Walk in Blade, Talk in Zither
eidolons.description: While "Parry" is active, if an enemy actively uses their abilities, regardless of whether it attacks Yunli or not, it will trigger "Intuit: Cull" and remove the "Parry" effect. When dealing DMG via "Intuit: Slash" or "Intuit: Cull," increases CRIT Rate by 15% and Physical RES PEN by 20%.

basic_atk.name: Votive Incense
basic_atk.description: Deals Fire DMG equal to 140% of Lingsha's ATK to one designated enemy target.

skill.name: Smoke and Splendor
skill.description: Deals Fire DMG equal to 100% of Lingsha's ATK to all enemies and at the same time, restores HP equal to 16.0% of Lingsha's ATK plus 538.13 for all allies. Fuyuan's action advances by 20%.

ultimate.name: Dripping Mistscape
ultimate.description:
Inflicts "Befog" on all enemies. While in "Befog," targets receive 30% increased Break DMG, lasting for 2 turn(s).
Deals Fire DMG equal to 180% of Lingsha's ATK to all enemies, and at the same time restores HP equal to 14.0% of Lingsha's ATK plus 461.25 for all allies. Fuyuan's action advances by 100%.

talent.name: Mistdance Manifest
talent.description:
When using Skill, summons "Fuyuan," with an initial SPD of 90 and an initial action count of 3.
When taking action, "Fuyuan" launches Follow-Up ATK, dealing Fire DMG equal to 93.75% of Lingsha's ATK to all enemies. Additionally deals Fire DMG equal to 93.75% of Lingsha's ATK to one random enemy, and this DMG prioritizes targets that have both Toughness greater than 0 and Fire Weakness. Dispels 1 debuff(s) from all allies and restores HP equal to 14.0% of Lingsha's ATK plus 461.25.
"Fuyuan's" action count can accumulate up to 5. When the action count reaches 0 or when Lingsha is knocked down, "Fuyuan" disappears.
While "Fuyuan" is on the field, using Skill can increase "Fuyuan's" action count by 3.

technique.name: Wisps of Aurora
technique.description: After using Technique, immediately summons Fuyuan at the start of the next battle and inflicts "Befog" on all enemies, lasting for 2 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Bloom on Vileward Bouquet
eidolons.description: Lingsha's Weakness Break Efficiency increases by 50%. When an enemy unit's Weakness is Broken, reduces their DEF by 20%.

eidolons.name: Leisure in Carmine Smokeveil
eidolons.description: When using Ultimate, increases all allies' Break Effect by 40%, lasting for 3 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Shine of Floral Wick
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Redolence from Canopied Banquet
eidolons.description: When Fuyuan takes action, restores HP equal to 40% of Lingsha's ATK for the ally target whose current HP is the lowest.

eidolons.name: Poise Atop Twists and Turns
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Arcadia Under Deep Seclusion
eidolons.description: While "Fuyuan" is on the field, reduces all enemies' All-Type RES by 20%. When "Fuyuan" attacks, additionally deals 4 instance(s) of DMG, with each instance dealing Fire DMG equal to 50% of Lingsha's ATK and 5 Toughness Reduction to one random enemy. This prioritizes targets with both Toughness greater than 0 and Fire Weakness.

basic_atk.name: Hurlthorn
basic_atk.description: Deals Lightning DMG equal to 140% of Moze's ATK to one designated enemy target.

skill.name: Fleetwinged Raid
skill.description:
Marks a designated single enemy target as "Prey" and deals to it Lightning DMG equal to 187.5% of Moze's ATK, and gains 9 points of Charge.
When there are no other characters on the field that are capable of combat, Moze cannot use his Skill and dispels the enemy's "Prey" state.

ultimate.name: Dash In, Gash Out
ultimate.description: Deals Lightning DMG equal to 324% of Moze's ATK to one designated enemy target, and launches the Talent's Follow-Up ATK against this target. If the target is defeated before this Follow-Up ATK is used, then launches the Follow-Up ATK against a random single enemy instead.

talent.name: Cascading Featherblade
talent.description:
When "Prey" exists on the field, Moze will enter the Departed state.
After ally targets attack "Prey," Moze will additionally deal 1 instance of Lightning Additional DMG equal to 37.5% of his ATK and consumes 1 point of Charge. For every 3 point(s) of Charge consumed, Moze launches 1 Follow-Up ATK to "Prey," dealing Lightning DMG equal to 200% of his ATK. When Charge reaches 0, dispels the target's "Prey" state and resets the tally of Charge points required to launch Follow-Up ATK. Talent's Follow-Up ATK does not consume Charge.

technique.name: Bated Wings
technique.description: After using Technique, enters the Stealth state for 20 second(s). While in Stealth, Moze is undetectable by enemies. If Moze attacks enemies to enter combat while in Stealth, increases DMG by 30%, lasting for 2 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Oathkeeper
eidolons.description: After entering battle, Moze regenerates 20 Energy. Each time the Additional DMG from his Talent is triggered, Moze regenerates 2 Energy.

eidolons.name: Wrathbearer
eidolons.description: When all allies deal DMG to the enemy target marked as "Prey," increases CRIT DMG by 40%.

eidolons.name: Deathchaser
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Heathprowler
eidolons.description: When using Ultimate, increases the DMG dealt by Moze by 30.0%, lasting for 2 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Truthbender
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Faithbinder
eidolons.description: Increases the DMG multiplier of the Talent's Follow-Up ATK by 25%.

basic_atk.name: My Sword Zaps Demons
basic_atk.description: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to 140% of March 7th's ATK to one designated enemy target and gains 1 point(s) of Charge.

skill.name: Master, It's Tea Time!
skill.description:
Designates one ally (excluding this unit) as "Shifu" and increases "Shifu"'s SPD by 12.0%. Only the most recent target of March 7th's Skill is considered as "Shifu."
Whenever using Basic ATK or dealing 1 hit of Enhanced Basic ATK's DMG, triggers the corresponding effect if "Shifu" with the specified Path is present on the field:
Erudition, Destruction, The Hunt, Remembrance, Elation: Deals Additional DMG (DMG Type based on "Shifu"'s Combat Type) equal to 25% of March 7th's ATK.
Harmony, Nihility, Preservation, Abundance: Increases the Toughness Reduction of this instance of DMG by 100%.

ultimate.name: March 7th, the Apex Heroine
ultimate.description:
Deals Imaginary DMG equal to 288% of March 7th's ATK to one designated enemy target.
Increases the initial Hits Per Action of the next Enhanced Basic ATK by 2 hit(s) and increase the fixed chance of additionally dealing DMG by 20%.

talent.name: Master, I've Ascended!
talent.description:
After Shifu uses an attack or Ultimate, March 7th gains up to 1 point of Charge each time.
Upon reaching 7 or more points of Charge, March 7th immediately takes action and increases the DMG she deals by 100%. Her Basic ATK gets Enhanced, and her Skill cannot be used. After using Enhanced Basic ATK, consumes 7 point(s) of Charge. Charge is capped at 10 points.

technique.name: Feast in One Go
technique.description:
If March 7th is on the team, she gains 1 point of Charge at the start of the next battle whenever a teammate uses Technique, up to a max of 3 point(s).
After using Technique, March 7th regenerates 30 Energy when the next battle starts.

extraAbilities.name: Brows Be Smitten, Heart Be Bitten
extraAbilities.description:
Initially, deals 3 hits, each causing Imaginary DMG equal to 112% of March 7th's ATK to one designated enemy target. When dealing the final hit, there is a 60% fixed chance to deal 1 additional hit of DMG, up to a max of 3 additional hit(s). Energy regenerated from using Enhanced Basic ATK does not increase with the number of hits.
Enhanced Basic ATK cannot recover Skill Points.

eidolons.name: My Sword Stirs Starlight
eidolons.description: When Shifu is on the field, increases March 7th's SPD by 10%.

eidolons.name: Blade Dances on Waves' Fight
eidolons.description: After "Shifu" uses Basic ATK or Skill to attack an enemy target, March 7th immediately launches a Follow-Up ATK and deals Imaginary DMG equal to 60% of March 7th's ATK to the primary target of this attack. Additionally, triggers the corresponding effect based on "Shifu"'s Path and then gains 1 point(s) of Charge. If there is no primary target available to attack, then she attacks a single random enemy instead. This effect can only trigger once per turn.

eidolons.name: Sharp Wit in Martial Might
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Being Fabulous Never Frights
eidolons.description: At the start of the turn, regenerates 5 Energy.

eidolons.name: Sword Delights, Sugar Blights
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Me, the Best Girl in Sight
eidolons.description: After using Ultimate, increases the CRIT DMG dealt by the next Enhanced Basic ATK by 50%.

basic_atk.name: Radiant Streak
basic_atk.description: Deals Fire DMG equal to 140% of Fugue's ATK to one designated enemy.

skill.name: Virtue Beckons Bliss
skill.description:
Grants one designated ally "Foxian Prayer". Enters the "Torrid Scorch" state, lasting for 3 turn(s). The duration decreases by 1 at the start of Fugue's every turn. "Foxian Prayer" only takes effect on the most recent target of Fugue's Skill.
The ally target with "Foxian Prayer" increases their Break Effect by 37.5% and can also reduce Toughness even when attacking enemies that don't have the corresponding Weakness Type, with the effect equivalent to 50% of the original Toughness Reduction value. This cannot stack with other Toughness Reduction effects that also ignore Weakness Type.
While in the "Torrid Scorch" state, Fugue enhances her Basic ATK. Every time an ally target with "Foxian Prayer" attacks, Fugue has a 100% base chance to reduce the attacked enemy target's DEF by 23%, lasting for 2 turn(s).

ultimate.name: Solar Splendor Shines Upon All
ultimate.description: Deals Fire DMG equal to 250% of Fugue's ATK to all enemies. This attack ignores Weakness Type to reduce all enemies' Toughness. And when breaking Weakness, triggers the Fire Weakness Break effect.

talent.name: Fortune Follows Where Virtue Spreads
talent.description:
While Fugue is on the field, enemy targets will get additionally afflicted with "Cloudflame Luster," equal to 40% of their Max Toughness. When the initial Toughness is reduced to 0, "Cloudflame Luster" can continue to be reduced. When "Cloudflame Luster" is reduced to 0, the enemy will receive Weakness Break DMG again.
While Fugue is on the field and after allies attack Weakness Broken enemy targets, converts the Toughness Reduction of this attack into 1 instance of 125% Super Break DMG.

technique.name: Percipient Shine
technique.description:
After using Technique, inflicts Daze on enemies within a certain area, lasting for 10 second(s). While Dazed, enemies will not actively attack ally targets.
After entering battle via actively attacking Dazed enemies, Fugue's action advances by 40%, with a 100% base chance to inflict each enemy target with the same DEF Reduction state as that applied by Fugue's Skill, lasting for 2 turn(s).

extraAbilities.name: Fiery Caress
extraAbilities.description: Deals Fire DMG equal to 140% of Fugue's ATK to one designated enemy and Fire DMG equal to 70% of Fugue's ATK to adjacent targets.

eidolons.name: Earthbound I Was, Cloudward I Be
eidolons.description: Ally target with "Foxian Prayer" increases their Weakness Break Efficiency by 50%.

eidolons.name: Beatitude Dawns for the Worthy
eidolons.description: When an enemy target's Weakness gets broken, Fugue regenerates 3 Energy. After using Ultimate, advances the action of all allies by 24%.

eidolons.name: Verity Weaves Thoughts to Blade
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Bereft of Form, Which Name to Bear
eidolons.description: Ally target with "Foxian Prayer" increases their Break DMG dealt by 20%.

eidolons.name: Colored Cloud Rains Fortune
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Clairvoyance of Boom and Doom
eidolons.description: Increases Fugue's Weakness Break Efficiency by 50%. While Fugue is in the "Torrid Scorch" state, "Foxian Prayer" takes effect on all allies.

basic_atk.name: Corkage Fee
basic_atk.description: Deals Fire DMG equal to 140% of Gallagher's ATK to one designated enemy target.

skill.name: Special Brew
skill.description: Immediately heals a target ally for 2020 HP.

ultimate.name: Champagne Etiquette
ultimate.description: Inflicts Besotted on all enemies, lasting for 2 turn(s). At the same time, deals Fire DMG equal to 187.5% of Gallagher's ATK to all enemies, and enhances his next Basic ATK to Nectar Blitz.

talent.name: Tipsy Tussle
talent.description: The Besotted state makes targets receive 15.0% more Break DMG. Every time a Besotted target gets attacked by an ally, the attacking ally's HP is restored by 808.

technique.name: Artisan Elixir
technique.description: Immediately attacks the enemy. Upon entering battle, inflicts Besotted on all enemies, lasting for 2 turn(s). And deals Fire DMG equal to 50% of Gallagher's ATK to all enemies.

extraAbilities.name: Nectar Blitz
extraAbilities.description: Deals Fire DMG equal to 350% of Gallagher's ATK to one designated enemy target. Reduces the target's ATK by 19.0%, lasting for 2 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Salty Dog
eidolons.description: When entering the battle, Gallagher regenerates 20 Energy and increases Effect RES by 50%.

eidolons.name: Lion's Tail
eidolons.description: When using the Skill, dispels 1 debuff(s) from the designated ally. At the same time, increases their Effect RES by 30% for 2 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Corpse Reviver
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Last Word
eidolons.description: Extends the duration of the Besotted state inflicted by Gallagher's Ultimate by 1 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Death in the Afternoon
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Blood and Sand
eidolons.description: Increases Gallagher's Break Effect by 20% and Weakness Break Efficiency by 20%.

basic_atk.name: Fleeting Fragrance
basic_atk.description: Deals Physical DMG equal to 140% of Argenti's ATK to one designated enemy target.

skill.name: Justice, Hereby Blooms
skill.description: Deals Physical DMG equal to 150% of Argenti's ATK to all enemies.

ultimate.name: For In This Garden, Supreme Beauty Bestows
ultimate.description: Consumes 90 Energy and deals Physical DMG equal to 192% of Argenti's ATK to all enemies.

talent.name: Sublime Object
talent.description: For every enemy hit when Argenti uses his Basic Attack, Skill, or Ultimate, regenerates Argenti's Energy by 3, and grants him a stack of Apotheosis, increasing his CRIT Rate by 3.3%. This effect can stack up to 10 time(s).

technique.name: Manifesto of Purest Virtue
technique.description:
After using the Technique, enemies in a set area are inflicted with Daze for 10 second(s). Dazed enemies will not actively attack the team.
When attacking a Dazed enemy to enter combat, deals Physical DMG to all enemies equal to 80% of Argenti's ATK and regenerates his Energy by 15.

extraAbilities.name: Merit Bestowed in "My" Garden
extraAbilities.description: Consumes 180 Energy and deals Physical DMG equal to 336% of Argenti's ATK to all enemies. And further deals DMG for 6 extra time(s), with each time dealing Physical DMG equal to 114% of Argenti's ATK to a random enemy.

eidolons.name: A Lacuna in Kingdom of Aesthetics
eidolons.description: Each stack of Apotheosis additionally increases CRIT DMG by 4%.

eidolons.name: Agate's Humility
eidolons.description: If the number of enemies on the field equals to 3 or more when the Ultimate is used, ATK increases by 40% for 1 turn(s).

eidolons.name: Thorny Road's Glory
eidolons.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Trumpet's Dedication
eidolons.description: At the start of battle, gains 2 stack(s) of Apotheosis and increases the maximum stack limit of the Talent's effect by 2.

eidolons.name: Snow, From Somewhere in Cosmos
eidolons.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: "Your" Resplendence
eidolons.description: When using Ultimate, ignores 30% of enemy targets' DEF.

basic_atk.name: Threading Fragrance
basic_atk.description: Deals Ice DMG equal to 140% of Ruan Mei's ATK to one designated enemy target.

skill.name: String Sings Slow Swirls
skill.description: After using her Skill, Ruan Mei gains Overtone, lasting for 3 turn(s). This duration decreases by 1 at the start of Ruan Mei's every turn. When Ruan Mei has Overtone, all allies' DMG increases by 40.0% and Weakness Break Efficiency increases by 50%.

ultimate.name: Petals to Stream, Repose in Dream
ultimate.description:
Ruan Mei deploys a Zone that lasts for 2 turns. The Zone's duration decreases by 1 at the start of her turn.
While inside the Zone, all allies' All-Type RES PEN increases by 30.0% and their attacks apply Thanatoplum Rebloom to the enemies hit.
When these enemies attempt to recover from Weakness Break, Thanatoplum Rebloom is triggered, extending the duration of their Weakness Break, delaying their action by an amount equal to 20% of Ruan Mei's Break Effect plus 10%, and dealing Break DMG equal to 60% of Ruan Mei's Ice Break DMG.
Enemy targets cannot have Thanatoplum Rebloom re-applied to them until they recover from Weakness Break.

talent.name: Somatotypical Helix
talent.description: Increases SPD by 11.0% for all teammates (i.e., excluding this unit). When allies Break an enemy target's Weakness, Ruan Mei deals to this enemy target Break DMG equal to 150.0% of her Ice Break DMG.

technique.name: Silken Serenade
technique.description:
After using the Technique, gains Silken Serenade. At the start of the next battle, automatically triggers the Skill for 1 time(s) without consuming Skill Points.
In Simulated Universe or Divergent Universe, when Ruan Mei has Silken Serenade, the team actively attacking enemies will always be regarded as attacking their Weakness to enter combat, and this attack can reduce all enemies' Toughness regardless of Weakness types. When breaking Weakness, triggers Weakness Break Effect corresponding to the attacker's Type.
